channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PSEB 10th Class 2026 Result Announcement Scheduled for Tomorrow at 12:30 PM
item.description: The Punjab School Education Board (PSEB) is all set to declare the results of the 10th class examinations for the year 2026 tomorrow at 12:30 PM. Students who appeared for these exams can check their ...

item.title: Liberals face scrutiny over One Nation preferences and political strategy after Farrer by-election
item.description: The recent Farrer by-election has left the Liberal Party grappling with the political fallout of their decision to preference One Nation over independent candidate Michelle Milthorpe. Shadow Treasurer...

item.title: Walang progreso sa usapang pangkapayapaan habang nagpapatuloy ang tensyon sa Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Patuloy ang tensyon sa pagitan ng Estados Unidos at Iran habang wala pa ring malinaw na progreso sa pagtatapos ng higit dalawang buwang digmaan. Umaasa ang US na tutugon ang Iran sa kanilang panukala ...

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs Impact Garden Centre Profits Ahead of Mother’s Day
item.description: As Mother’s Day approaches this Sunday, garden centres across Canada are facing financial pressure due to sharply increasing fuel costs. Many local greenhouses and nurseries rely heavily on transporta...

item.title: Experts Warn of Rising Global Nuclear and Geopolitical Risks
item.description: At a two-day conference organised by the Pakistan Institute of International Affairs (PIIA) in Karachi, experts and officials highlighted the increasing risk of global crises, with nuclear threats top...

item.title: Elephant Management Practices at Madikwe Reserve Under Scrutiny
item.description: Recent developments at Madikwe Nature Reserve in the North West Province of South Africa suggest a concerning shift in elephant conservation strategies. Historically, culling elephants was considered ...

item.title: Labour leadership under pressure following local election losses
item.description: Pressure is mounting on Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer after the party suffered significant losses in the recent local elections. Many MPs are reportedly questioning his leadership, with backbencher C...

item.title: Steve Kerr Signs New Contract to Continue Coaching the Golden State Warriors
item.description: According to reports, Steve Kerr will continue his role as head coach of the Golden State Warriors under a new contract. Kerr, who has led the team to multiple NBA championships, is expected to mainta...

item.title: CJI Surya Kant Denies Falsely Attributed Casteist Statement on Social Media
item.description: In an unusual step of directly addressing misinformation, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant has publicly denied a statement circulating on social media that was falsely attributed to him. The fabricat...

item.title: Two-year-old rescued from Ottawa River, transported to hospital in critical condition
item.description: On Friday evening, a two-year-old child was rescued from the Ottawa River in a critical condition following an extensive water rescue operation. Gatineau Fire Services reported that the rescue effort ...

item.title: Woman charged over alleged antisemitic remarks at junior netball match in Sydney
item.description: A 42-year-old woman has been charged after allegedly making antisemitic comments during a junior netball game at Heffron Park, Maroubra, Sydney. The incident occurred at a match between Saints Netball...

item.title: Lere Olayinka Clarifies Supreme Court Did Not Nullify Wike-Backed PDP Faction
item.description: Senior Special Assistant on Public Communications and Social Media to the FCT Minister, Nyesom Wike, Lere Olayinka, don come out to clarify the wahala wey dey around the recent PDP convention for Abuj...

item.title: Laura Windsor outlines when certain youthful habits become inappropriate
item.description: Laura Windsor, often referred to as the 'Queen of Etiquette,' has provided guidance on the appropriate ages to reconsider certain youthful habits. Drawing from her experience advising on Regency-era s...

item.title: Dr Ofweneke Ties the Knot with Diana in a Colourful Traditional Wedding
item.description: Comedian and YouTuber Dr Ofweneke has officially married his lovely wife Diana in a vibrant traditional wedding ceremony that has captured the hearts of many Kenyans. The event was full of colour, joy...

item.title: Vilakazi advises Pirates to stay focused despite title advantage
item.description: Orlando Pirates’ legendary striker Benedict “Tso” Vilakazi has urged the Buccaneers to remain focused as the Premiership title race tightens. Despite Mamelodi Sundowns drawing 1-1 with Kaizer Chiefs, ...

item.title: Nationals MP Colin Boyce reflects on political future following One Nation's Farrer byelection success
item.description: Nationals MP Colin Boyce has indicated that he is considering a shift to One Nation following the Farrer byelection, where the Coalition's primary vote fell to around 20%. Speaking in Albury after One...

item.title: Quebec launches pilot digital health system to improve patient care and reduce administrative burden
item.description: Quebec has launched a pilot project for a new digital health dashboard, beginning early Saturday in Montreal and Mauricie. The system, developed by Epic Systems, aims to replace traditional faxes, pap...

item.title: Ida Odinga Receives Lifetime Achievement Award for Decades of Service in Education and Women's Advocacy
item.description: Nairobi: Mama Ida Odinga, widow of former Prime Minister Raila Odinga, was honoured with the Africa Lifetime Achievement Award at the Thamani Africa Awards held on 9th May at the Catholic University o...

item.title: Josh Widdicombe considered for Strictly Come Dancing hosting role
item.description: Josh Widdicombe, the 43-year-old comedian, has reportedly become the leading candidate to host Strictly Come Dancing, potentially becoming the first male presenter since the legendary Bruce Forsyth. W...

item.title: Nigeria Customs investigates officer over alleged highway extortion
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service don start disciplinary action after one viral video show one of their officers dey allegedly demand N200,000 from motorist for Lagos-Benin Expressway. The Federal Operation...
